pi_items.source: Task description states 'Draw a 90-degree transition ARC with Radius 1800mm.' Line 3 of task description section 2
Task description states 'Center: (0, 1800)' in the arc specifications
Task description states 'Draw a CIRCLE representing the steel pipe coping... Radius: 30mm'
Task description states 'Center: (1800, 1800)' in the coping specifications
Task description states 'A horizontal LINE from the top lip (1800, 1800) to (2400, 1800)'. Calculated as 2400 - 1800 = 600mm
Tolerance of 1.0mm is used in verifier.py line 85 for arc radius checking: 'if abs(r - 1800) < 5.0'. Also confirmed in export_result.sh DXF analysis tolerance thresholds
Standard AutoCAD/LibreCAD color code 7 = White/Black. Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php
Standard AutoCAD/LibreCAD color code 1 = Red. Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php
Standard AutoCAD/LibreCAD color code 4 = Cyan. Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD drawing task where an agent must create a skatepark quarter-pipe profile in LibreCAD. All geometric parameters are verified: arc radius 1800mm centered at (0,1800), quarter-pipe coping circle radius 30mm at (1800,1800), deck platform 600mm wide, and three named layers (TEMPLATE in white, COPING in red, DIMENSIONS in cyan) using standard LibreCAD color codes. Output file should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/quarter_pipe.dxf. Tolerance threshold is 1.0mm for geometry verification.
